span.p:
Web Application
Next.js 16 / React 19
Provides chat UI, file uploads,
questionnaire generation, scoring,
assessment & scoring report export

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
API Server
Express 5 / Node.js 22
REST + WebSocket for chat,
document parsing, scoring, exports

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Database
PostgreSQL 17
Stores users, conversations, messages,
vendors, assessments, questions, files,
responses, dimension scores, results

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
File Storage
Local (dev) / S3 (prod)
Stores uploaded vendor docs
and scoring response files

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Anthropic Claude API
claude-sonnet-4-5
Conversation, question generation,
document parsing, scoring analysis
